Configuration for GitHub issue templates, disabling blank issues and providing contact links for security and questions.

# Purpose
The configuration file disables the creation of blank issues by setting `blank_issues_enabled` to `false`. It also provides a list of `contact_links` for users to report security issues, ask questions, and engage in discussions. Each contact link includes a `name`, `url`, and `about` section to guide users on how to use the contact method appropriately.
